metadata.problem_statement:
TSQL - L031 incorrectly triggers "Avoid using aliases in join condition" when no join present

## Expected Behaviour

Both of these queries should pass, the only difference is the addition of a table alias 'a':

```
SELECT [hello]
FROM
    mytable
```

```
SELECT a.[hello]
FROM
    mytable AS a
```

## Observed Behaviour

The aliased query fails with L031 even though there is no join condition.
